title: miquelina coccinea
intro: Miquelina coccinea is a flowering plant species in the family Rubiaceae. It is native to South America and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Miquelina coccinea include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and pneumonia. Miquelina coccinea can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
